title: Exotic Food at the International Festival

all.en: The annual International Food Festival came to our city last weekend, attracting thousands of visitors.
all.zh: 一年一度的國際美食節上週末在我們的城市舉行，吸引了數以千計的遊客。

all.en: Over forty countries set up colorful tents to introduce their most unusual traditional dishes.
all.zh: 超過四十個國家設立了色彩繽紛的攤位，介紹他們最具特色的傳統料理。

all.en: My adventurous classmate, Daniel, dared me to try at least five exotic foods that day.
all.zh: 我那愛冒險的同學丹尼爾激我那天要至少嘗試五種異國食物。

all.en: I started carefully with a sweet Turkish pastry filled with pistachios and rose syrup.
all.zh: 我先小心地嘗了一塊填滿開心果與玫瑰糖漿的甜土耳其點心。

all.en: Next, I tried Peruvian ceviche, which is raw fish marinated in fresh lime juice and chili.
all.zh: 接著，我嘗試了秘魯酸醃魚，那是用新鮮萊姆汁與辣椒醃漬的生魚。

all.en: Then came a Korean dish made from spicy fermented cabbage and pickled radishes.
all.zh: 再來是一道由辣味發酵白菜與醃蘿蔔做成的韓式料理。

all.en: At the Mexican booth, I bit into a crunchy taco filled with grasshoppers and chili sauce.
all.zh: 在墨西哥攤位，我咬了一口塞滿蚱蜢與辣椒醬的酥脆塔可餅。

all.en: My friends screamed when they saw the insects, but they actually tasted nutty and salty.
all.zh: 我的朋友們看到那些昆蟲時都尖叫起來，但牠們的味道其實有堅果香與鹹味。

all.en: For my fifth dish, I bravely sampled a strong-smelling Norwegian fish called fermented herring.
all.zh: 我的第五道菜，是勇敢地嘗試一種氣味強烈的挪威魚，名叫發酵鯡魚。

all.en: The smell was so powerful that I needed two cups of water to recover afterward.
all.zh: 那氣味實在太強烈，我事後得喝兩杯水才能緩解。

all.en: Even though some flavors surprised me, the festival reminded me how diverse the world truly is.
all.zh: 雖然有些味道讓我大吃一驚，這個節慶讓我體會到世界是多麼多元。

all.en: After lunch, I wandered toward the dessert section to try some lighter sweet treats.
all.zh: 午餐後，我漫步到甜點區，想嘗試一些較清爽的甜食。

all.en: A friendly Italian chef offered me a tiny cup of homemade lemon gelato.
all.zh: 一位親切的義大利廚師遞給我一小杯自製的檸檬冰淇淋。

all.en: The cold, sour taste cleansed my mouth after so many strong flavors.
all.zh: 那冰涼酸甜的滋味，在嚐過這麼多重口味後，幫我洗淨了味蕾。

all.en: Daniel pulled me toward an Indian booth selling crispy samosas with mint sauce.
all.zh: 丹尼爾把我拉到一個賣酥脆咖哩餃配薄荷醬的印度攤位。

all.en: The spices were warm but not overwhelming, which surprised both of us.
all.zh: 那些香料溫和卻不過於濃烈，這讓我們兩個都感到意外。

all.en: Live music from a Brazilian band started playing, encouraging visitors to dance freely.
all.zh: 巴西樂團開始現場演奏，鼓勵遊客自在地隨之起舞。

all.en: We bought colorful drinks served inside fresh coconuts from a Thai stall.
all.zh: 我們在一個泰式攤位買了用新鮮椰子盛裝的繽紛飲料。

all.en: A volunteer explained how each country chose dishes representing their cultural heritage.
all.zh: 一位志工解釋每個國家如何挑選能代表其文化傳統的料理。

all.en: By sunset, my stomach was full, but my mind was even fuller of new ideas.
all.zh: 到了日落時分，我的胃已經滿了，腦中卻裝著更多新點子。

all.en: Daniel and I promised each other to attend this festival together every single year.
all.zh: 丹尼爾和我互相承諾，要每年都一起參加這個節慶。

all.en: The next year, Daniel and I planned our visit a full month in advance.
all.zh: 隔年，丹尼爾和我提前整整一個月就開始規劃這次的造訪。

all.en: We mapped out every booth on a small printed brochure to avoid missing rare dishes.
all.zh: 我們在小冊子上標出每個攤位，以免錯過任何罕見的料理。

all.en: This time, I dared to try fermented shark from Iceland, which had a powerful sharp smell.
all.zh: 這次我鼓起勇氣嘗了冰島的發酵鯊魚肉，那股氣味十分強烈刺鼻。

all.en: Daniel laughed when my face turned green after just one tiny mouthful.
all.zh: 我才嚐了一小口臉就變綠，丹尼爾忍不住哈哈大笑。

all.en: To recover, we shared a creamy Indian mango lassi in a tall frosted glass.
all.zh: 為了緩和味道，我們一起喝了一杯裝在霜杯裡、奶香濃郁的印度芒果優酪。

all.en: A Nigerian chef invited us to taste jollof rice cooked slowly over an open flame.
all.zh: 一位奈及利亞主廚邀請我們品嚐用明火慢煮的烤飯。

all.en: We met two travel bloggers who recorded our reactions for their online cooking channel.
all.zh: 我們遇到兩位旅遊部落客，他們把我們的反應錄進線上烹飪頻道。

all.en: By evening, my passport of flavors had grown by another seven exotic stamps.
all.zh: 到了傍晚，我這本味覺護照又新增了七個異國印章。

all.en: Daniel proposed that we save up to attend a festival overseas the following summer.
all.zh: 丹尼爾提議我們存錢，明年夏天一起去參加海外的美食節。

all.en: As fireworks closed the night, we toasted with coconut water to many more brave bites.
all.zh: 當煙火為夜晚畫下句點時，我們舉起椰子水，敬未來更多勇敢的嘗試。
